title: 2023 DPA Malaysia total compensation
summary: Median annual total compensation for designers in Malaysia was RM83,000, based on 46 respondents. Medium confidence for Junior to Senior IC levels; Malaysia has the second-highest respondent count in the survey but trails Singapore significantly, limiting analysis at senior and leadership levels. Compensation by level: Junior IC RM55,000 (N=13), Mid-level IC RM82,000 (N=13), Senior IC RM94,325 (N=10). Lead/Staff/Principal IC (N=5), People Manager (N=3), and Director (N=2) fall below the minimum safe disclosure threshold of 10 respondents and are not published individually.
methodology: Self-reported annual total compensation figures in local currency (MYR), including base salary, annual bonus, annual stock grants, and other compensation. Figures are self-reported and have not been independently verified.
